title: thelypteris rigida
intro: Thelypteris rigida, also known as the stiff maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being.
